metadata.title: Humberto Ham — Software Engineer & Mathematician
metadata.description: Software engineer with a strong foundation in mathematics, software engineering, and system design. Focused on building reliable, scalable, and thoughtfully structured solutions.
metadata.keywords: Humberto Ham, Software Engineer, Mathematician, System Design, Web Development, Automation
metadata.openGraphDescription: My work is driven by a strong foundation in mathematics, software engineering, and a deep understanding of systems.
metadata.twitterDescription: Building scalable, maintainable, and logically sound software through precision and system thinking.
metadata.structuredDescription: Software engineer with a strong foundation in mathematics and system design, focused on long-term reliability and clarity in software.
